_readme: Hand-curated dated catalysts for the Terminal calendar. APPEND RULES for the 15:00 content shift: only add a row when the date is verified in a primary source or one of Quinn's published posts; a date you cannot verify STAYS OUT (blank beats fake). Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD, required), t (ticker, may be empty for market-wide events), what (required, short), why (one line, Quinn's voice, no em dashes), receipt (URL to the post or filing that grounds it). Earnings dates come from the machine's earnings_calendar automatically; only add an earnings row here if you have a WHY worth reading. KNOWN GAPS to fill when verifiable: MU next earnings date (FQ ends late Aug, date not yet announced), SKHY ADS lockup expiry (check the F-1).

catalysts.why: The contrarian Chemours case leans on PFAS rules landing survivable. This is the day the public comment window shuts and the docket goes quiet.
Founding members lock $99 a year for life before the price goes to $200. The Terminal becomes a member perk.
The glass-substrate drilling thesis gets its first print since the badge went STRESSED. Guidance on packaging demand is the tell.
First print since the re-entry. The pivot story either shows up in the numbers or it does not.
